Finding: Network: Cisco Discovery Protocol (CDP) enabled on external interfaces.
Description: External facing router broadcasts sensitive network topology data.

Finding: Application: SQL Injection vulnerability on login portal.
Description: Unsanitized user input on the login form allows arbitrary database queries.

Finding: Active Directory: Default Domain Admin credentials in use.
Description: The built-in Administrator account is using a known default password.
A production S3 bucket containing PII has public read access enabled.
A corporate laptop was deployed without CrowdStrike Falcon installed.
